targets.rawSql: SELECT selector_last("n_cpus", "time")['value'] FROM "system" WHERE "time" >= $__timeFrom AND "time" <= $__timeTo
SELECT selector_last("uptime", "time")['value'] FROM "system" WHERE "time" >= $__timeFrom AND "time" <= $__timeTo

SELECT
  "time_bin" AS "time",
  "core_id",
  "usage"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      date_bin(COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL, "time") AS "time_bin",
      "core_id",
      AVG("usage_user" + "usage_system") AS "usage"
    FROM
      "cpu"
    WHERE
      "time" >= $__timeFrom
      AND "time" <= $__timeTo
    GROUP BY
      "core_id",
      "time_bin"
  )
ORDER BY
  "time" ASC

SELECT
  "time_bin" AS "time",
  "usage",
  "total"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      date_bin(COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL, "time") AS "time_bin",
      AVG("used") AS "usage",
      AVG("total") AS "total"
    FROM
      "mem"
    WHERE
      "time" >= $__timeFrom
      AND "time" <= $__timeTo
    GROUP BY
      "time_bin"
  )
ORDER BY
  "time" ASC

SELECT
  "time_bin" AS "time",
  "free",
  "total"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      date_bin(COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL, "time") AS "time_bin",
      AVG("swap_free") AS "free",
      AVG("swap_total") AS "total"
    FROM
      "mem"
    WHERE
      "time" >= $__timeFrom
      AND "time" <= $__timeTo
    GROUP BY
      "time_bin"
  )
ORDER BY
  "time" ASC

SELECT
  "time_bin" AS "time",
  "usage",
  "total"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      date_bin(COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL, "time") AS "time_bin",
      AVG("used") AS "usage",
      AVG("total") AS "total"
    FROM
      "disk"
    WHERE
      "time" >= $__timeFrom
      AND "time" <= $__timeTo
      AND "device" = '$diskName'
    GROUP BY
      "time_bin"
  )
ORDER BY
  "time" ASC

SELECT
  "time_bin" AS "time",
  "read",
  "write"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      date_bin(COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL, "time") AS "time_bin",
      AVG("read_bytes") AS "read",
      AVG("write_bytes") AS "write"
    FROM
      "diskio"
    WHERE
      "time" >= $__timeFrom
      AND "time" <= $__timeTo
      AND "name" = '$diskName'
    GROUP BY
      "time_bin"
  )
ORDER BY
  "time" ASC

  "time_bin" AS "time",
  "read_shifted",

FROM
  (
    SELECT
      date_bin(COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL, "time")+COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL AS "time_bin",

      AVG("write_bytes") AS "write_shifted"
    FROM
      "diskio"
    WHERE
      "time" >= $__timeFrom
      AND "time" <= $__timeTo
      AND "name" = '$diskName'
    GROUP BY
      "time_bin"
  )
ORDER BY
  "time" ASC

  "time_bin" AS "time",

FROM

    FROM
      "net"
    WHERE
      "time" >= $__timeFrom
      AND "time" <= $__timeTo
      AND "interface" = '$networkInterface'
    GROUP BY
      "time_bin"
  )
ORDER BY
  "time" ASC

SELECT
  "time_bin" AS "time",

  "write_shifted"
FROM
  (

      date_bin(COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL, "time")+COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL AS "time_bin",

      AND "time" <= $__timeTo
      AND "interface" = '$networkInterface'

ORDER BY
  "time" ASC

SELECT
  "time_bin" AS "time",
  SUM("read") AS "read",
  SUM("write") AS "write"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      date_bin(COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL, "time") AS "time_bin",
      AVG("rx_bytes") AS "read",
      AVG("tx_bytes") AS "write"
    FROM
      "docker_container_net"
    WHERE
      "time" >= $__timeFrom
      AND "time" <= $__timeTo
    GROUP BY
      "com.docker.compose.service",
      "time_bin"
  )
GROUP BY
  "time"
ORDER BY
  "time" ASC

SELECT
  "time_bin" AS "time",
  SUM("read_shifted") AS "read_shifted",
  SUM("write_shifted") AS "write_shifted"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      date_bin(COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL, "time")+COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL AS "time_bin",
      AVG("rx_bytes") AS "read_shifted",
      AVG("tx_bytes") AS "write_shifted"
    FROM
      "docker_container_net"
    WHERE
      "time" >= $__timeFrom
      AND "time" <= $__timeTo
    GROUP BY
      "com.docker.compose.service",
      "time_bin"
  )
GROUP BY
  "time"
ORDER BY
  "time" ASC

SELECT
  "time",
  CASE WHEN "created" = 0 THEN NULL ELSE "created" END AS "created",
  CASE WHEN "restarting" = 0 THEN NULL ELSE "restarting" END AS "restarting",
  CASE WHEN "running_healthy" = 0 THEN NULL ELSE "running_healthy" END AS "running_healthy",
  CASE WHEN "running_unhealthy" = 0 THEN NULL ELSE "running_unhealthy" END AS "running_unhealthy",
  CASE WHEN "removing" = 0 THEN NULL ELSE "removing" END AS "removing",
  CASE WHEN "paused" = 0 THEN NULL ELSE "paused" END AS "paused",
  CASE WHEN "exited" = 0 THEN NULL ELSE "exited" END AS "exited",
  CASE WHEN "dead" = 0 THEN NULL ELSE "dead" END AS "dead",
  CASE WHEN "unknown_status" = 0 THEN NULL ELSE "unknown_status" END AS "unknown_status",
  CASE WHEN "total_health" = 0 THEN NULL ELSE "total_health" END AS "total_health"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      "time_bin" AS "time",
      SUM("created") AS "created",
      SUM("restarting") AS "restarting",
      SUM("running_healthy") AS "running_healthy",
      SUM("running_unhealthy") AS "running_unhealthy",
      SUM("removing") AS "removing",
      SUM("paused") AS "paused",
      SUM("exited") AS "exited",
      SUM("dead") AS "dead",
      SUM("unknown_status") AS "unknown_status",
      SUM("created" + "restarting" + "running_healthy" + "running_unhealthy" + "removing" + "paused" + "exited" + "dead") AS "total_health"
    FROM
      (
        SELECT
          date_bin(COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL, "time") AS "time_bin",
          `com.docker.compose.service` AS "service",
          AVG(CASE WHEN "container_status" = 'created' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS "created",
          AVG(CASE WHEN "container_status" = 'restarting' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS "restarting",
          AVG(CASE WHEN "container_status" = 'running' AND "health_status" = 'healthy' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS "running_healthy",
          AVG(CASE WHEN "container_status" = 'running' AND "health_status" != 'healthy' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS "running_unhealthy",
          AVG(CASE WHEN "container_status" = 'removing' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS "removing",
          AVG(CASE WHEN "container_status" = 'paused' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS "paused",
          AVG(CASE WHEN "container_status" = 'exited' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS "exited",
          AVG(CASE WHEN "container_status" = 'dead' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS "dead",
          AVG(CASE WHEN "container_status" NOT IN ('created', 'restarting', 'running', 'removing', 'paused', 'exited', 'dead') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS "unknown_status"
        FROM
          "docker_container_health"
        WHERE
          "time" >= $__timeFrom
          AND "time" <= $__timeTo
        GROUP BY
          "service",
          "time_bin"
      )
    GROUP BY
      "time"
  )
ORDER BY
  "time" ASC

SELECT
  "time_bin" AS "time",
  "total_containers"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      date_bin(COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL, "time") AS "time_bin",
      AVG("n_containers_running") AS "total_containers",
    FROM
      "docker"
    WHERE
      "time" >= $__timeFrom
      AND "time" <= $__timeTo
    GROUP BY
      "time_bin"
  )
ORDER BY
  "time" ASC

SELECT
  `com.docker.compose.service` AS "Service",
  selector_last("container_status", "time")['value'] AS "Status",
  selector_last("health_status", "time")['value'] AS "Health"
FROM
  "docker_container_health"
WHERE
  "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY
  "Service"
ORDER BY
  "Health" DESC,
  "Service" ASC
SELECT selector_last("uptime_ns", "time")['value'] FROM "docker_container_status" WHERE "time" >= $__timeFrom AND "time" <= $__timeTo AND "com.docker.compose.service" = '$dockerContainer'

SELECT
  MIN("uptime")
FROM (
  SELECT
    "com.docker.compose.service" AS "service",
    selector_last("uptime_ns", "time")['value'] AS "uptime"
  FROM
    "docker_container_status"
  WHERE
    "time" >= $__timeFrom
    AND "time" <= $__timeTo
  GROUP BY
    "service"
)

SELECT
  date_bin(COALESCE($interval,'$__interval_ms milliseconds')::INTERVAL, "time") AS "time_bin",
  AVG("usage_percent") AS "usage"
FROM
  "docker_container_cpu"
WHERE
  "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
  AND "com.docker.compose.service" = '$dockerContainer'
GROUP BY
  "time_bin"
ORDER BY
  "time_bin" ASC

list.label: Window Size
list.name: interval
list.query: Auto : NULL, 15s : '15 seconds', 30s : '30 seconds', 1m : '1 minutes', 5m : '5 minutes', 10m : '10 minutes', 30m : '30 minutes', 1h : '1 hours'
